summary.intent: Refactor gossamer from an Electron desktop app to a VS Code extension to reduce install friction, then implement a full feature set including sessions view, session detail, checkpoint tree, search, image rendering, and an embedded MCP server.
summary.outcome: Successfully built a VS Code extension with sessions list, session detail tabs (column 2), native checkpoint tree view with SCM color decorations, VS Code QuickPick search with FTS database integration, image rendering for user/Claude messages, native diff view via in-memory TextDocumentContentProvider, an embedded MCP server at /mcp, and a stable port configuration. Also extracted core indexing logic into @gossamer/core npm workspace package.

repo: Each repo in ~/.gossamer/config.json gets its own SQLite database at a per-repo dbPath — never create or push schema to a new database file
The server runs from gossamer-testing/dist/serve.js (the worktree), not gossamer/dist/ — rebuilds must happen in gossamer-testing for changes to take effect in the running extension
Entire.io writes session data to the entire/checkpoints/v1 git branch and a shadow branch; gossamer reads those and indexes them into SQLite via packages/core
LogEvent.slug carries the session name and updates on /rename — the API fetches the latest slug via orderBy id desc + distinct sessionId, so renames propagate automatically on next hook event
Images are stored as base64 in full.jsonl on the entire/checkpoints/v1 branch; the schema needed imageData and imageMediaType columns added to LogContent
The ShadowSession.cwd field is the canonical way to determine which git repo a checkpoint belongs to — many endpoints had bugs using the server's configured repoDir instead
DEFAULT_PORT = 3456 is now stored in src/config.ts and shared by server, VS Code extension (reads ~/.gossamer/config.json), and the MCP install script
findRepoForPath() uses prefix matching (not exact match) because session cwd may be a subdirectory of the registered repo root

code.finding: Original file only listed src/extension.ts and src/GossamerPanel.ts in 'include' — SessionDetailPanel.ts and diffUtils.ts were silently never compiled. Fixed to src/**/*.ts with src/webview excluded.

Server is a static singleton (GossamerPanel.server, GossamerPanel.serverPort) that outlives panel disposal. acquireVsCodeApi() is called once and stored as window.__vscodeApi to prevent double-call when React app also tries to acquire it.

Uses in-memory TextDocumentContentProvider with gossamer-diff: URI scheme instead of temp files. Content stored in a Map keyed by URI string, served synchronously. File extension preserved in URI path for syntax highlighting.
Must check window.__vscodeApi before calling acquireVsCodeApi() — the host page script stores the instance there, and acquireVsCodeApi() can only be called once per webview lifetime.

File watchers (fs.watch) replace polling: .db and .db-wal watched at 50ms debounce for SQLite changes, .git/refs/ and packed-refs watched at 200ms debounce for shadow branch updates. Both have 30s fallback polls.
imageData String? and imageMediaType String? added to LogContent model. SQLite ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN works for adding nullable columns when Prisma db push fails with FTS table conflicts.
resourceUri must use absolute paths (join(repoPath, relativePath)) for VS Code SCM decorations to apply correct git status colors. Relative paths silently don't match.
ViewColumn.Two opens session detail tabs alongside (left of) the main Gossamer panel. ViewColumn.Three opens to the right. ViewColumn.Beside is relative to current focus and unpredictable.
root and outDir must use absolute paths via resolve(__dirname, ...) — relative paths resolve from CWD (repo root when run via npm workspace -w flag), not the package directory.
createMcpServer(port) factory pattern allows the same tool definitions to be shared between the embedded StreamableHTTPServerTransport at /mcp and the thin stdio wrapper in mcp.ts.

workflow: Git worktrees can't check out the same branch twice — create a new branch (testing from mcp) for the worktree
VS Code webview panels reload completely when moved to a new window — re-send any initialization messages (like server_ready) via onDidChangeViewState
VS Code content providers are the right approach for read-only diff content — no temp files, inherently read-only, syntax highlighting works via file extension in URI path
Chord keybindings (Ctrl+K G) are VS Code convention for less-frequent extension commands and avoid conflicts with core bindings

When a VS Code extension needs native Node.js modules (better-sqlite3), spawn a child process using system node (which node) rather than importing in the extension host — avoids NODE_MODULE_VERSION mismatches with VS Code's bundled Electron node
npm run build -w <workspace-name> requires the exact name from package.json, not the directory name

friction: Server running from gossamer-testing/dist/ (worktree) not the main repo — multiple build/test cycles wasted before identifying this
tsconfig.extension.json listing only specific files silently omitted new source files from compilation with no error until runtime failure
acquireVsCodeApi() can only be called once — required refactor to store as window.__vscodeApi and thread through both host page script and React module
better-sqlite3 NODE_MODULE_VERSION mismatch required full architecture change (spawn child process instead of direct import)
Prisma db push failed on FTS tables in one database requiring direct SQLite ALTER TABLE as workaround
Vite entry resolution failure when using relative path for root — silent in some configurations, failed in workspace context
Accidentally made Electron app changes when user wanted VS Code changes (user explicitly corrected: 'this is not an electron app')
ViewColumn for session detail tabs changed three times (One → Three → Two) before settling
Stray ~/.gossamer/gossamer.db created during schema push testing, violating per-repo DB invariant
Static server singleton added complexity to restart flow — required explicit gossamer.restartServer command since panel close no longer kills server
Content Security Policy missing img-src blocked all base64 image rendering silently
Toggle panel keybinding (Ctrl+K G) unreliable when webview has keyboard focus
open_items: Toggle panel keybinding (Ctrl+K G) doesn't fire when webview has focus — chords are captured by webview; needs investigation or alternative approach
Session rename propagation only works when a subsequent hook event fires after /rename — if user renames and immediately closes, rename won't appear until next indexing cycle
Electron app is explicitly broken (user approved) — deprecation path not formally tracked
gossamer.focusSidebar command uses vscode.commands.executeCommand('gossamer.checkpoints.focus') which may not be reliable across VS Code versions
Image support only applies to sessions re-indexed after schema migration — existing sessions need manual Sync to backfill imageData (backfill script was run once but not automated)
Claude-output images are not yet handled — only user-input images were wired up in EventItem.tsx
Onboarding flow doesn't handle the case where entire.io is installed but the repo isn't in ~/.gossamer/config.json and the server fails to start
MCP server uses stateless StreamableHTTPServerTransport (sessionIdGenerator: undefined) — stateful sessions not supported if needed later
Branch history in checkpoint tree requires findRepoForPath prefix matching but this only works for repos registered in ~/.gossamer/config.json — unregistered repos silently return no branch history
